_comment: Mode B pointer chains. Copy to <gameVersion>.json and fill in real values discovered with Cheat Engine (see docs/mode-b-live-capture.md). 'base' is a hex offset from the module base; 'chain' is the list of dereference offsets; the per-player array is read by adding slot*playerStride to the final address. The capture command refuses to run while any field is a 0x0/empty placeholder.
